example: Please say your name clearly before the meeting begins.
exampleCn: 请在会议开始前清楚地说出你的名字。

example: All the students in our class passed the exam.
exampleCn: 我们班所有的学生都通过了考试。

example: You can get free tickets at the front desk.
exampleCn: 你可以在前台拿到免费的票。

example: We make fresh bread in our kitchen every morning.
exampleCn: 我们每天早上在厨房做新鲜面包。

example: There is only one apple left on the table.
exampleCn: 桌上只剩下一个苹果了。

example: We don't have much time before the train leaves.
exampleCn: 火车开走之前我们没有多少时间了。

example: Please take this umbrella with you; it may rain.
exampleCn: 请带上这把伞，可能要下雨。

example: My friends often come to my house on weekends.
exampleCn: 我的朋友们周末经常来我家。

example: I will give you my answer tomorrow morning.
exampleCn: 我明天早上给你答复。

example: Eating vegetables every day is good for your health.
exampleCn: 每天吃蔬菜对健康有好处。

example: You may leave the room when you finish the test.
exampleCn: 考试做完后你可以离开房间。

example: We spent a wonderful day at the beach together.
exampleCn: 我们一起在海滩度过了美好的一天。

example: She came back home late after the long meeting.
exampleCn: 开完长会后她很晚才回到家。

example: The workers made the road surface smooth and even.
exampleCn: 工人们把路面修得又光滑又平整。

example: Every child needs love and care from parents.
exampleCn: 每个孩子都需要父母的关爱。

example: Please put the books back on the shelf.
exampleCn: 请把书放回书架上。

example: He is too mean to share his food with anyone.
exampleCn: 他太吝啬了，不愿和任何人分享食物。

example: I got a call from my mother this morning.
exampleCn: 今天早上我接到了妈妈打来的电话。

example: She wants to become a doctor in the future.
exampleCn: 她将来想成为一名医生。

example: Travel helps us understand the world much better.
exampleCn: 旅行帮助我们更好地了解世界。

example: The children walk to school together every morning.
exampleCn: 孩子们每天早上一起步行去上学。

example: We will leave for the airport at six tomorrow.
exampleCn: 我们明天六点出发去机场。

example: I feel very happy when I listen to music.
exampleCn: 听音乐的时候我感到非常开心。

example: In that case, we should change our plan now.

example: A small group of students is studying in the library.

example: Most people in this town work at the factory.

example: My family has dinner together every Sunday evening.

example: They bought a new house near the river last year.
exampleCn: 他们去年在河边买了一栋新房子。

example: His company has offices in three different cities.

example: Please keep your room clean and tidy.

example: Every student should bring a notebook to class.

example: Please let me know when you arrive home safely.

example: This quiet place is perfect for reading books.

example: She held the little key tightly in her hand.

example: We are planning a birthday party for my sister.

example: China is a large country with a long history.

example: My new neighbor is an American from New York.

example: We waited until the end of the movie.

example: Don't forget to bring your homework to school tomorrow.

example: Learning English is very important for your future career.

example: Please drink more water after you exercise.

example: My room has a big window facing the garden.

example: Ice is a solid form of water.

example: The study of history helps us understand today.

example: My grandmother buys fresh vegetables at the market every morning.

exampleCn: 医生仔细测量了我的体重和身高。

example: We took a wonderful trip to the mountains last week.
exampleCn: 上周我们去山里进行了一次愉快的旅行。

example: The new school year begins in September.
exampleCn: 新学年九月开始。

example: I borrow books from the library every week.
exampleCn: 我每周从图书馆借书。

example: The surface of the lake is calm and smooth.
exampleCn: 湖面平静而光滑。

example: She moved to America to study music last year.
exampleCn: 她去年搬到美国学习音乐。

example: He had trouble finding the right address yesterday.
exampleCn: 他昨天费了很大劲才找到正确的地址。

example: January is usually the coldest month of the year.
exampleCn: 一月通常是一年中最冷的月份。

example: We usually have a big family lunch on Sunday.
exampleCn: 我们通常在星期日吃一顿丰盛的家庭午餐。

example: The garden looks beautiful in the morning light.
exampleCn: 花园在晨光中显得很美丽。

example: Please read the text carefully before answering the questions.
exampleCn: 回答问题前请仔细阅读课文。

example: Many tourists visit the western part of the country.
exampleCn: 许多游客游览该国的西部地区。

example: York is an old city with beautiful ancient walls.
exampleCn: 约克是一座有着美丽古城墙的古老城市。

example: I could hear the beat of my own heart.
exampleCn: 我能听到自己的心跳声。

example: This jacket is a perfect fit for you.
exampleCn: 这件夹克你穿正合身。

example: Mom is cooking soup in the kitchen now.
exampleCn: 妈妈现在正在厨房里煮汤。

example: The weather turns cold in late November here.
exampleCn: 这里十一月下旬天气转冷。

example: We celebrate the new year at the end of December.
exampleCn: 我们在十二月底庆祝新年。

example: The existing rules need to be updated soon.
exampleCn: 现有的规定需要尽快更新。

example: My father reads the newspaper with his morning coffee.
exampleCn: 我爸爸边喝早晨的咖啡边看报纸。

example: We saw a big brown bear in the forest.
exampleCn: 我们在森林里看到一只大棕熊。

example: We invited our neighbors to dinner on Saturday.
exampleCn: 我们邀请邻居周六来吃晚餐。

example: Air travel makes the world feel much smaller.
exampleCn: 航空旅行让世界显得小多了。

example: A quarter of the students come from other cities.
exampleCn: 四分之一的学生来自其他城市。

example: The cold wind blew strongly all night long.
exampleCn: 寒风刮了一整夜。

example: I left my key in the office again.
exampleCn: 我又把钥匙落在办公室了。

example: We watched an exciting football match last night.
exampleCn: 昨晚我们观看了一场精彩的足球比赛。

example: The new railway connects the two big cities.
exampleCn: 新铁路连接了这两座大城市。

example: This restaurant serves the best noodles in town.
exampleCn: 这家餐馆的面条是城里最好吃的。

example: He bought the new television on credit.
exampleCn: 他以赊账的方式买了那台新电视。

example: My grandmother drinks green tea every afternoon.
exampleCn: 我奶奶每天下午喝绿茶。

example: We often go shopping together on Saturday morning.
exampleCn: 我们经常在星期六早上一起去购物。

example: Today is a perfect day for a picnic.
exampleCn: 今天是野餐的完美日子。

example: We had a pleasant conversation about our school days.
exampleCn: 我们围绕学生时代进行了一次愉快的交谈。

example: My uncle grows corn and rice on his farm.
exampleCn: 我叔叔在他的农场里种玉米和水稻。

example: Oxford is home to one of the oldest universities.
exampleCn: 牛津拥有世界上最古老的大学之一。

example: Good sleep is very important for your health.
exampleCn: 良好的睡眠对健康非常重要。

example: Please make a copy of this document for me.
exampleCn: 请帮我复印一份这份文件。

example: The British weather changes quickly from sunny to rainy.
exampleCn: 英国的天气说变就变，一会儿晴一会儿雨。

example: The train to Beijing leaves at eight in the morning.
exampleCn: 开往北京的火车早上八点发车。

example: We are going camping in the mountains this weekend.
exampleCn: 这个周末我们要去山里露营。

example: I bought a new pair of running shoes yesterday.
exampleCn: 我昨天买了一双新跑鞋。

example: She has studied Chinese for three years.
exampleCn: 她学中文已经三年了。

example: The big ship slowly left the busy port.
exampleCn: 那艘大船缓缓驶离繁忙的港口。
